name: career-os
description: AI-Powered Career Operating System — See Your Future Before You Decide

scripts.db:generate: cd apps/web && pnpm exec prisma generate --schema=src/lib/db/prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.db:push: cd apps/web && pnpm exec prisma db push --schema=src/lib/db/prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.db:migrate: cd apps/web && pnpm exec prisma migrate dev --schema=src/lib/db/prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.db:seed: cd apps/web && pnpm exec prisma db seed --schema=src/lib/db/prisma/schema.prisma
